name: Coffee Table Natural - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add warmth and character to your home with this Dove Detailed Soft-Edge Coffee Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This rectangular coffee table features a natural light brown finish with dark brown highlights to bring depth and visual interest to your room. Made with a poplar wood frame and tabletop, this coffee table showcases a soft-edge design and a box-like silhouette with small blocky legs for a charming look that fits beautifully in your living room or den.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 35.625 inches
Overall Height: 13.25 inches
Overall Depth: 23.625 inches
Distance from Floor to bottom panel: 2.75 inches
